data.title: Gate.io has launched Pell Network (PELL) pre-market OTC trading
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Gate.io pre-market OTC trading has officially launched Pell Network (PELL) at 17:00 (UTC+8) on March 7, 2025.

data.title: 1inch Identifies Vulnerability In Fusion V1 Parser Smart Contract
data.description: According to Foresight News, 1inch has disclosed a vulnerability found in the parser smart contract using the outdated Fusion v1 implementation. Discovered on March 5, the flaw does not compromise the safety of end-user funds but may affect those using the Fusion v1 parser in their contracts. Despite the security of user funds, 1inch is actively collaborating with affected parsers to ensure their systems are secure. The 1inch team urges all parsers to audit and update their contracts immediately.

data.title: Binance has frozen the account of a market maker that dumped GPS tokens
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to Binance's investigation, the market maker sold a total of about 70 million GPS between 13:00 (UTC) on March 4, 2025 and 9:55 (UTC) on March 5, 2025, and did not place any buy orders. After the spot trading was opened, the market maker continued to sell GPS and became the biggest profiteer, making a profit of about US$5 million.
Binance has launched an in-depth investigation into the incident and temporarily frozen the relevant market maker accounts.
According to Odaily's previous report, Binance will expand the monitoring tag to GPS.

data.title: Bitcoin forgets Strategic Reserve 'sell the news event' with 4% bounce
data.description:
Bitcoin bulls are already reclaiming a BTC price slide which came after the Bitcoin Strategic Reserve executive order fell short of market expectations.
source: https://cointelegraph.com/news/bitcoin-forgets-strategic-reserve-sell-the-news-bounce?utm_source=rss_feed&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=rss_partner_inbound

data.title: BitMart launches GrokCoin(GROKCOIN)
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, BitMart will launch GrokCoin (GROKCOIN) at 18:30 (Eastern Time) on March 7, and the GROKCOIN/USDT trading pair will be opened.
GROKCOIN is a meme coin on Solana

data.title: Binance to add observation tags to GPS
data.description:
Odaily Planet Daily News According to the official announcement, Binance will add the observation tag to GoPlus Security (GPS) on March 7, 2025.
The announcement shows: "Observation tag tokens may have higher volatility and risks than other listed tokens. We will closely observe and continue to review. Please be aware that trading these tokens with observation tags is risky. These tokens no longer meet the standards when they were listed on our platform and may be delisted."

data.title: Trump establishes strategic reserve: no immediate purchase of new bitcoins
data.description:
The executive order stipulates that the government will retain confiscated bitcoin. Details on the absence of an immediate accumulation strategy.
The post Trump establishes strategic reserve: no immediate purchase of new bitcoins appeared first on Atlas21.
source: https://atlas21.com/trump-establishes-strategic-reserve-no-immediate-purchase-of-new-bitcoins/?utm_source=rss&utm_medium=rss&utm_campaign=trump-establishes-strategic-reserve-no-immediate-purchase-of-new-bitcoins

data.title: From pixels to propaganda: How gaming lost its soul to forced agendas
data.description:
“The studio made their game because they wanted to make a game that they wanted to play themselves…above all, they cared about their game, because they love games,” said Larian CEO Swen Vicke at the 2024 Game Awards. If you are a gamer, then you more than likely felt how deep those words were. Bit […]
source: https://www.cryptopolitan.com/how-gaming-lost-its-soul-to-forced-agendas/

data.title: Over $3 Billion in Bitcoin and Ethereum Options Expire, Triggering Market Volatility
data.description:
Over $3 billion in Bitcoin and Ethereum options are expiring today, fueling market volatility ahead of Trump's White House Crypto Summit and macroeconomic uncertainties.
source: https://coinpaprika.com/news/over-3-billion-in-bitcoin-and-ethereum-options-expire-triggering-market-volatility

data.title: James Butterfill: Although the US Bitcoin strategic reserve has not increased, it is an important step towards legalization
data.description: Odaily Planet Daily News: James Butterfill, head of research at CoinShares, believes that the crypto community should not be disappointed that the U.S. Bitcoin Strategic Reserve has not further increased its holdings of Bitcoin, because the establishment of the reserve itself is an important step in promoting the legalization of Bitcoin assets.
